scripts.build: npm run build -w @bndynet/chat-messages && npm run build -w @bndynet/chat-input && npm run build -w @bndynet/chat-renderers && npm run build -w @bndynet/chat && npm run build -w apps/demo
scripts.dev: concurrently -n messages,input,renderers,chat,demo -c cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,green "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat-messages" "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat-input" "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat-renderers" "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat" "npm run dev -w chat-demo"
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build && npm publish -w @bndynet/chat-messages --access public && npm publish -w @bndynet/chat-input --access public && npm publish -w @bndynet/chat-renderers --access public && npm publish -w @bndynet/chat --access public
